item.title: Hello World!
item.description:
Hello and welcome to my blog. A little background about me. I currently live in Southern California. I used to live in Northern Cali. I love food, travel, Aikido, trading and coding. I have been to most part of Asia. I have been training Aikido for about three or four years (different styles of Aikido). I used to work as a Software Engineer for startups and major corporations. Traveling and taking a break from Software Development: I really miss coding with my favorite vim. I am now working for my self running a couple of small businesses and a startup. As I started working on my new startup, I really wanted to start blogging again. This time I decided to go with Hugo and github pages. I used to use Jekyll and used to host it on DigitalOcean. I have been comparing a few static site generators like Hexo, Hugo, Octopress, etc … After playing with different static site generators, I decided to go with Hugo and GitHub Pages.

Thank you for reading my blog.
